subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-09-23 in London
subcodes.first_line: You are very welcome. I have come far to see you. I praise God that after forty years of waiting I am permitted at last to come and bring my message.
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @race unity; racial issues, @spiritual transformation, @universal peace; world unity
